poll.question: Fuel's running low. Diddy demands a vote to ration the stove—command, order, control. Kanye refuses: 'Voting stifles genius. The landscape speaks.' Selena tends the flame

options.label: Diddy's Command
options.desc: Democracy votes. Rationing. Hierarchy holds the line.

options.label: Kanye's Vision
options.desc: Burn free. Trust the fire. Morale first.

options.label: Selena's Hands
options.desc: The one tending it decides. Quiet wins.

in_play.label: Hot Meals
in_play.desc: Feed them first; morale is survival.
